content: Hi, I'm a wedding planner, and I'm thinking of getting a dog to keep me company on the weekends when I'm not working.
That sounds like a great idea, Dana! Having a dog can be a wonderful way to unwind and relax after a busy week of planning weddings.
Exactly! I've been so busy with work lately, and I just started a side project - an online course on wedding planning. It's been a lot to juggle, but I'm excited about the potential.
Congratulations on the new course, Dana! That's a big undertaking. What made you decide to create an online course, and how's it going so far?

Thanks! I just felt like there was a need for more resources on wedding planning, and I wanted to share my expertise with others. It's been a lot of work, but I'm hoping it'll be worth it in the end. My business partner, Alex, has been a huge help.
It's great that you have a supportive partner. As a wedding planner, you must have seen your fair share of adorable wedding dogs - what kind of breed do you think you'd like to get?
I've always loved the idea of having a surf-loving dog, maybe a labradoodle or something. I live in California, so it would be great to have a dog that loves the beach as much as I do.
That sounds like a perfect fit for you, Dana! A labradoodle would be a great companion for beach trips and hikes. Have you thought about how you'll balance dog care with your busy work schedule?
Yeah, I've thought about it. My sister, Emily, has offered to help out with dog sitting when I'm away at weddings or working on my course. She's actually a dog trainer, so that's a bonus!

That's wonderful! Having a professional dog trainer as a sister must be very helpful. What do you like to do in your free time, aside from wedding planning and working on your course? Any hobbies that bring you joy?
I'm really into knitting, and I've also been trying to get into travel blogging. I love exploring new places and trying new foods.
It's great that you have diverse interests, Dana. You could even consider combining your love of travel and dogs by taking your future furry friend on adventures with you.
It was great chatting with you, Dana. I hope you find the perfect dog to join you on your beach trips and hikes!
